fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Parent Item Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the parent of the traced item ledger entry.

fields.name: Level
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the traced item.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the traced item was posted.

fields.name: Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the traced entry.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of record, such as Sales Header, that the item is traced from.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the record that the item is traced from.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the traced document.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the traced item.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location of the traced item.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the traced item in the line.

fields.name: Remaining Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity in the Quantity field that remains to be processed.

fields.name: Open
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Positive
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number to be traced.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the traced lot number.

fields.name: Item Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the traced item ledger entry.

fields.name: Created by
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user who created the traced record.

fields.name: Created on
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the traced record was created.

fields.name: Record Identifier
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Item Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the item.

fields.name: Already Traced
fields.tooltip: Specifies if additional transaction history under this line has already been traced by other lines above it.

fields.name: Package No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the traced package number.
